name: Falls Catholic
description_short: Falls Catholic Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with competitive rates.
description_long:
Falls Catholic Credit Union (FCCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union headquartered in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio, with a routing number 241278109. The institution has deep community roots, with members reporting decades of relationship history with the organization. As a credit union, FCCU operates under NCUA insurance and membership principles rather than traditional for-profit banking structures.

FCCU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs), certificates of deposit, auto loans, home mortgage loans, personal signature loans, and credit cards. Their current rate offerings (as of March 1, 2025) include auto loans as low as 4.79% APR, certificates as high as 3.70% APY, signature loans as low as 8.95% APR, and share rates up to 0.20% APY. The credit union provides online banking access through both web and mobile platforms (Apple App Store and Google Play Store) with member account management capabilities.

What distinguishes FCCU is its emphasis on personalized member service and community connection. Multiple member testimonials highlight staff knowledge, helpfulness, and the ability to reactivate dormant accounts and manage complex banking relationships. The organization maintains a physical presence with at least one Graham Road office location and conducts annual membership meetings, emphasizing member governance typical of credit union structures. Member reviews consistently reference 20-50+ year relationships, suggesting strong member retention and institutional loyalty.

As a credit union, FCCU benefits from not-for-profit tax status and member ownership, which theoretically allows more competitive rates and lower fees than commercial banks. However, the website provides limited detail on membership eligibility requirements, specific fees, minimum balances, or comprehensive product terms. The mobile and online banking platforms appear functional but lack detailed information about features or security specifications on the public website.
services: Mobile banking (Apple App Store and Google Play Store apps)
Annual membership meetings and member governance
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.79% APR as of March 2025
Personalized member service with staff able to reactivate dormant accounts and manage complex banking needs
Long-term member relationships documented in testimonials spanning 20-50+ years
Comprehensive financial products including auto, home, and personal loans; checking; savings; IRAs; and credit cards
Mobile banking access through both Apple App Store and Google Play Store for account management
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure typically offering more competitive rates than commercial banks
Physical office presence with annual membership meetings ensuring member governance
cons: Website lacks specific information on membership eligibility requirements and field of membership restrictions
Limited disclosure of account fees, minimum balance requirements, or specific product terms
No published information about customer service hours, branch locations beyond Graham Road, or phone/email contact details on homepage
Signature loan rates of 8.95% APR are higher than some competitors, suggesting limited product competitiveness in personal lending
Website does not specify whether membership is open to general public or restricted to specific groups/employers
best_for: Current and former members with existing relationships seeking personalized service for auto or mortgage financing
Community members in the Cuyahoga Falls area seeking long-term banking relationships with member ownership benefits
Consumers prioritizing local, personalized service over online-only banking convenience
Borrowers eligible for membership seeking competitive rates on auto and home loans
diagnosis: Falls Catholic Credit Union is best for existing members and Cuyahoga Falls-area residents seeking personalized, relationship-based financial services with competitive rates on auto and mortgage lending. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements are not disclosed on the website, and the institution may have field-of-membership restrictions typical of community credit unions, requiring verification of eligibility before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
